name: audiencescore
title: AudienceScore — verified-review trust scores
description: MCP server that returns a vendor's AudienceScore: the percent of verified thumbs-up across reviews each gated by cryptographic proof the reviewer really transacted with or participated in what they reviewed, with a Wilson 95% lower bound and sample size, as an Ed25519-signed manifest the caller can independently recompute from public data. A vendor with too few verified reviews returns a not-displayed manifest rather than a fabricated number.

tools.name: get_score
tools.description: Get an offering's verified-review trust score as a signed, recomputable manifest.

arguments.offering: string, required — the offering to score, e.g. field-elevate-demo@v1

tools.name: get_score_evidence
tools.description: Get the de-identified public evidence needed to recompute an offering's score manifest.

arguments.offering: string, required — the offering whose evidence to fetch

note: Hosted pilot endpoint (Streamable HTTP) at https://mcp.audiencescore.org/mcp; also self-hostable from source over stdio. Pilot deployment, pre-cryptographic-audit. Verified scores populate as issuers begin signing receipts.
